section_title: Obstructing sale of property offered for sale by authority of public servant
chapter_title: Of Contempts of the Lawful Authority of Public Servants
text: Whoever intentionally obstructs any sale of property offered for sale by the lawful authority of any public servant, as such, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one month, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.
